fields.name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
fields.description: Premium wireless headphones with 40-hour battery life and active noise cancellation. Experience studio-quality sound with deep bass and crystal-clear highs.

fields.name: Smart Watch Pro X
fields.description: Next-generation smartwatch with health monitoring, GPS, and 7-day battery life. AMOLED display with always-on mode.

fields.name: Premium Running Shoes
fields.description: Engineered for performance with ultra-lightweight foam and adaptive cushioning. Perfect for road and trail running.

fields.name: Minimalist Leather Wallet
fields.description: Handcrafted genuine leather wallet with RFID blocking technology. Holds up to 12 cards with a slim profile.

fields.name: Aromatic Diffuser Set
fields.description: Premium ultrasonic diffuser with 10 essential oils. Creates a calming atmosphere with color-changing LED lights.

fields.name: Luxury Skincare Set
fields.description: 6-piece premium skincare collection with vitamin C serum, hyaluronic acid, and retinol cream for radiant skin.

fields.name: 4K Drone Camera
fields.description: Professional-grade drone with 4K stabilized camera, 30-minute flight time, and obstacle avoidance.

fields.name: Yoga Mat Premium
fields.description: Eco-friendly non-slip yoga mat made from natural rubber with alignment lines and carrying strap.

fields.name: Velvet Designer Handbag
fields.description: Luxurious velvet handbag with gold-tone hardware and suede interior. The perfect statement piece.

fields.name: Smart LED Desk Lamp
fields.description: App-controlled smart lamp with adjustable color temperature, brightness levels, and USB charging port.

fields.name: Wireless Earbuds Pro
fields.description: True wireless earbuds with spatial audio, adaptive transparency, and 36-hour total battery life.

fields.name: Ceramic Coffee Set
fields.description: Handmade ceramic coffee set with pour-over dripper, server, and 2 mugs. Artisan craftsmanship.
